mapper.select:
SELECT ss.share_id AS shareId, ss.spot_id AS spotId, ss.share_user_id AS shareUserId, ss.share_title AS shareTitle, ss.share_content AS shareContent, ss.blurred_lng AS blurredLng, ss.blurred_lat AS blurredLat, ss.view_count AS viewCount, ss.like_count AS likeCount, ss.share_status AS shareStatus, ss.create_time AS createTime, su.nickname AS nickname, su.avatar AS avatar, fs.spot_name AS spotName, fs.water_type AS waterType FROM spot_share ss INNER JOIN sys_user su ON ss.share_user_id = su.user_id AND su.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN fishing_spot fs ON ss.spot_id = fs.spot_id AND fs.deleted = 0
ss.deleted = 0 AND ss.share_status = 1
AND (ss.share_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ss.share_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fs.spot_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND fs.water_type = #{waterType}
ORDER BY ss.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE spot_share SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE share_id = #{shareId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE spot_share SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE share_id = #{shareId} AND deleted = 0
